subject: [PATCH v7 08/10] dax/kmem: extract hotplug/hotremove helper functions

2026-07-12.patch_summary: This patch refactors the kmem probe and remove functions by extracting initialization, cleanup, hotplug, and hot-remove logic into separate helper functions. The new helpers enable future extensions to support more granular control over memory hotplug operations. This is a pure refactoring with no functional change, allowing for re-use of hotunplug code without destroying underlying resources.
